name: Peoples Bank
description_short: At 3100 Woburn St in Bellingham, WA, Peoples Bank serves the local community with full-service banking.
description_long:
Peoples Bank's Bellingham branch is located at 3100 Woburn St, a convenient stop for residents and business owners in Bellingham, WA. This standalone banking center provides standard deposit, lending, and account services.

At this Bellingham location, you can access savings accounts, checking accounts, loans, and general financial services. While specific phone numbers for this branch are not listed, you can reach customer service through the main bank line or visit in person during regular banking hours.

When visiting the 3100 Woburn St location in Bellingham, bring a valid ID for account verification and any documents related to your transaction. Peoples Bank is a reliable banking choice for Bellingham-area residents and business owners seeking straightforward personal and commercial banking solutions.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with terms from 6 months to 5 years
Business loans and lines of credit
Online and mobile banking with credit insights tool
pros: Over 100 years of operating history and established community presence
Current CD rates of 3.40% APY for 7 and 15-month terms
Teen Access Checking and Youth Savings accounts specifically designed for younger savers
Free credit insights tool integrated with online banking (credit score, reports, monitoring, alerts)
Multiple branch locations throughout Washington State with emphasis on customer service
Comprehensive business banking services including merchant processing and remote deposit capture
Referral program offering up to $500 annually in Visa Virtual Rewards
cons: Requires active Peoples Bank checking account to open CD special offer accounts
CD specials require $1,000 minimum deposit and are not available for online account openings
Limited to Washington State geographic footprint with no indication of expanded service areas
No mention of mobile banking app features or digital-only account opening capabilities
Investment services mentioned but details are minimal and truncated on website
best_for: Washington State residents seeking community bank relationship with local branch access
Families wanting to establish teen and youth banking accounts with financial education
Small business owners needing integrated checking, lending, and merchant services
Customers prioritizing personal service relationships over digital-only banking
diagnosis: Peoples Bank is best for Washington State residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with emphasis on personal relationships and local branch service. The main caveat is geographic limitation to Washington State and reliance on physical branch infrastructure, which may be less convenient for customers preferring purely digital banking or those outside the service area.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Peoples Bank at 3100 Woburn St, Bellingham, WA. Full-service banking for residents and businesses.
